program.name: Medicare Savings Program (MSP)
program.description:
The Medicare Savings Program helps pay for Medicare costs. It covers premiums, deductibles, and copays. There are four types: QMB, SLMB, QI, and QDWI. Each type helps with different Medicare costs. You must have Medicare Part A to qualify for most types.

You can get help if your income is low. Single people must earn less than $1,695 per month. Couples must earn less than $2,301 per month. You must also have limited savings and assets. You must live in Texas and meet other rules.
program.description_short: Help paying for Medicare premiums and costs
program.apply_button_description: Apply for Texas Medicare Savings Program
program.estimated_value: Varies by program - QMB covers Part A and B premiums plus cost-sharing; SLMB covers Part B premiums; QI covers Part B premiums; QDWI covers Part A premiums
program.website_description: Helps pay Medicare premiums, deductibles, and copays for people with low income

documents.text: Proof of home address (ex: lease, utility bill)
Social Security Number or proof you applied for one
Medicare card showing Part A enrollment
Proof of income (ex: pay stubs, Social Security statement, pension statement)
Proof of assets (ex: bank statements, investment accounts). Do not include your home, one vehicle, household goods, or burial funds up to $1,500
Proof of U.S. citizenship or qualified immigration status
Proof of disability (for QDWI program only)
